home.heroSubtitle: Experience nature at Banana Aqua Park - Your eco-friendly tropical escape
home.welcomeBody: Escape to paradise at our eco-friendly resort featuring luxurious accommodations, thrilling aqua park adventures, and sustainable tourism practices in a stunning tropical setting.
home.cardLuxuryBody: Experience comfort and elegance in our beautifully designed rooms and suites, each featuring modern amenities and stunning views.
home.cardAquaBody: Dive into excitement with our world-class water slides, pools, and aquatic adventures perfect for guests of all ages.
home.cardEventsBody: Host your wedding, birthday or corporate activities in our top eco-friendly facilities.
home.ctaBody: Book now and experience the perfect blend of luxury and nature
home.comparisonSubtitle: From a relaxing afternoon to a full luxurious stay — there's a perfect option for you.
home.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know before your visit.
home.faqQ1: How far is Banana Aqua Park from Punta Cana?
home.faqA1: About 49 minutes by car from Punta Cana International Airport. We're located in Matachalupe, Higüey — easily reachable from both Punta Cana and La Romana. Free parking is available on site.
home.faqQ2: What experiences are available at Banana Aqua Park?
home.faqA2: You can choose from an Afternoon Pass (1:30–5 PM), a full Day Pass (9 AM–5 PM), or an overnight stay at our eco villas. All options include access to our natural aqua park, pools, basketball courts, pool table, and ping pong.
home.faqQ3: Is it suitable for families with young children?
home.faqA3: Absolutely. Our pools and aqua park attractions are designed for all age groups. Families with young children are one of our most frequent guest types — the natural setting, open spaces, and varied activities make it a great fit for everyone.
home.faqQ4: What's included in the Day Pass?
home.faqA4: The Day Pass covers full-day access (9 AM–5 PM) to the aqua park, all pools, basketball courts, pool table, and ping pong — plus lunch. It's the most complete day-visit option we offer.
home.faqQ5: Can I book Banana Aqua Park for a private event?
home.faqA5: Yes. We host weddings, birthday parties, corporate retreats, and other group events in our eco-friendly facilities. Contact us directly to discuss availability, capacity, and packages for your event.

rooms.headerSubtitle: Discover our range of eco-friendly accommodations, from cozy standard rooms to luxurious villas
rooms.availableSubtitle: Choose from our comfortable and eco-friendly accommodations
rooms.includedSubtitle: Enjoy these amazing amenities and services during your stay at Banana Ranch Villages
rooms.descriptionShort: Escape to paradise at Banana Ranch Villages — a lush eco-friendly resort nestled in the tropical heart of the Dominican Republic. Our beautifully appointed villas and rooms blend comfortable luxury with authentic Caribbean living, offering world-class amenities including a thrilling aqua park, tropical gardens, and attentive 24/7 service.
rooms.descriptionFull:
Escape to paradise at Banana Ranch Villages — a lush eco-friendly resort nestled in the tropical heart of the Dominican Republic. Our beautifully appointed villas and rooms blend comfortable luxury with authentic Caribbean living, offering world-class amenities including a thrilling aqua park, tropical gardens, and attentive 24/7 service.

Each accommodation is carefully designed to offer the perfect blend of comfort and natural surroundings. Wake up to the sounds of nature, enjoy your morning coffee on a private terrace, and spend your days exploring our sprawling resort grounds.

Our commitment to sustainable tourism means you can enjoy an unforgettable stay while treading lightly on this beautiful island. From solar-powered facilities to locally sourced dining options, every detail reflects our passion for eco-conscious hospitality.

Whether you're celebrating a special occasion, unwinding as a family, or simply craving a tropical escape, Banana Ranch Villages is your perfect destination.
rooms.cancellationLine1: Free cancellation up to 7 days before check-in
rooms.cancellationLine3: Contact us to review the full policy

howToGetHere.pageSubtitle: We're 49 minutes from Punta Cana Airport — easy to reach for a day trip or a villa stay.
howToGetHere.route1Sub: Punta Cana area · by car or taxi
howToGetHere.route1Step1: Take Autopista del Este heading west toward Higüey
howToGetHere.route1Step2: Exit at Higüey and follow signs to Matachalupe
howToGetHere.route1Step3: Arrive at Banana Aqua Park — free parking on site
howToGetHere.route2Step1: Head west on Autopista del Coral from La Romana
howToGetHere.route2Step2: Take the Carretera La Romana–Higüey exit toward Higüey
howToGetHere.route2Step3: Follow signs to Matachalupe — free parking on arrival
howToGetHere.route3Step2: Pass through San Pedro de Macorís, continue to Higüey
howToGetHere.route3Step3: Follow Matachalupe signs on arrival in Higüey
howToGetHere.route4Sub: PUJ Airport · arrive and come straight
howToGetHere.route4Step1: Exit PUJ Airport and take Autopista del Este west
howToGetHere.route4Step3: Drop bags at a villa — your adventure starts immediately
howToGetHere.route4Badge: Best for villa guests · book ahead
howToGetHere.tipsTitle: Good to Know Before You Arrive
howToGetHere.tip1Val: Free, on-site. Large vehicles and buses welcome.
howToGetHere.tip2Val: Banana Aqua Park, Matachalupe, Higüey. Search by name in Google Maps or Waze.
howToGetHere.tip3Val: Gates open at 9 AM. Arrive early on weekends.
howToGetHere.tip4Val: Local taxis, Uber, or InDriver available. Ask your hotel concierge or book a round-trip driver.
howToGetHere.tip5Val: We work with local agencies. Ask your resort excursion desk about Banana Aqua Park day trips.
howToGetHere.tip6Val: Share your location and we'll send a pin. +1 829-599-9540
howToGetHere.waText: Not sure how to get here? Send us a WhatsApp and we'll share our exact location pin, help arrange a driver, or answer any question.
howToGetHere.mapAddress: Matachalupe, Higüey, La Altagracia, Dominican Republic

privacy.intro: BANANA Ranch Villages (operating as Banana Aqua Park, hereinafter "we", "us" or "our") is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, your rights under Dominican Republic law (Ley 172-13) and applicable international standards, and how to contact us with questions.
privacy.s1Body: Banana Aqua Park is a tourism and hospitality venue located in Matachalupe, Higüey, La Altagracia, Dominican Republic. We operate this website (bananaaquapark.com) and provide accommodation, aqua-park day passes, and event services.
privacy.s2Body: We collect the following categories of personal data:
privacy.s2I1: Identification data: first name, last name, email address, phone number, country of origin.
privacy.s2I2: Booking data: check-in and check-out dates, number of guests, special requests, selected services.
privacy.s2I3: Identity document: ID number or passport reference collected at physical check-in, as required by Dominican Republic tourism regulations.
privacy.s2I4: Emergency contact information: optionally provided during booking.
privacy.s2I5: Communication data: subject and message content submitted via the contact form, together with your IP address and browser user-agent, collected automatically for security and spam-prevention purposes.
privacy.s2I6: Account data (staff only): first and last name, email, hashed password, phone number. Self-registration is disabled; accounts are created by administrators only.
privacy.s2I7: Technical / session data: authentication cookies (httpOnly, 7-day expiry), session identifiers stored in our database (24-hour expiry), and – if analytics are enabled – standard Google Analytics cookies (_ga, _gid).
privacy.s3Body: We process your personal data for the following purposes:
privacy.s3I1: To create and manage your reservation or day-pass booking and send confirmation emails.
privacy.s3I2: To respond to enquiries submitted through the contact form.
privacy.s3I3: To fulfil legal obligations under Dominican Republic tourism and hospitality regulations, including physical check-in identification.
privacy.s3I4: To secure our systems: login-attempt monitoring, account lockout, and password-reset flows.
privacy.s3I5: To improve our website through aggregated, anonymised analytics (Google Analytics), where enabled.
privacy.s4Body: We rely on the following legal bases: (a) performance of a contract – processing necessary to fulfil your booking; (b) legal obligation – identity verification required by Dominican Republic law; (c) legitimate interest – fraud prevention and website security; (d) consent – analytics cookies, which you may withdraw at any time.
privacy.s5Body: We share your data with the following service providers, solely to the extent necessary to deliver our services:
privacy.s5I1: Microsoft (Azure / Microsoft Graph API): used to send transactional emails (booking confirmations, password resets). Data is transmitted over TLS and governed by Microsoft's Data Processing Agreement.
privacy.s5I2: Google Maps: embedded map iframes on our website transmit your IP address to Google servers. No JavaScript API key is used. Google's Privacy Policy applies.
privacy.s5I3: Google Analytics (conditional): only active if configured by site administrators. Standard analytics data (device type, pages visited, session duration) is sent to Google. No personally identifiable information is intentionally included. You can opt out via browser settings or Google's opt-out extension.
privacy.s5I4: We do not integrate any payment gateway. All payments (cash, card, or bank transfer) are completed in person at the venue and recorded manually by staff. We never store card numbers, CVV codes, or bank account details.
privacy.s6Body: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary: booking records are retained for a minimum of five (5) years to comply with Dominican tax and tourism regulations; contact-form submissions are retained for twenty-four (24) months; authentication tokens expire within 7 days; session data expires within 24 hours.
privacy.s7Body: Under Ley 172-13 and aligned international standards, you have the right to:
privacy.s7I1: Access the personal data we hold about you.
privacy.s7I3: Request deletion of your data, subject to legal retention obligations.
privacy.s7I4: Object to processing based on legitimate interest.
privacy.s7I5: Withdraw consent for analytics cookies at any time.
privacy.s7I6: Lodge a complaint with the Instituto Dominicano de las Telecomunicaciones (INDOTEL) if you believe we have violated your rights.
privacy.s7Contact: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at info@bananaaquapark.com or via WhatsApp at +1 829-599-9540.
privacy.s8Body: We use the following cookies: (a) Authentication cookie ("token"): httpOnly, secure in production, 7-day lifetime — necessary for login sessions, not optional; (b) Session cookie ("sessionId"): httpOnly, 24-hour lifetime — necessary for server-side session management; (c) Analytics cookies (_ga, _gid): set by Google Analytics only when enabled — you may block these in your browser settings.
privacy.s9Body: Our services are open to families, including children. We do not knowingly collect personal data directly from children under age 13. Parental or guardian consent is required for any booking that includes minors. If you believe a child's data has been submitted without consent, please contact us immediately.
privacy.s10Body: We protect your data using industry-standard measures: TLS encryption for all data in transit, bcrypt password hashing, time-limited verification and reset tokens generated with cryptographically secure randomness, httpOnly/Secure cookie flags, and rate limiting on authentication endpoints.
privacy.s11Body: Email services are processed by Microsoft on servers that may be located outside the Dominican Republic. All transfers are covered by Microsoft's standard contractual commitments. Analytics data (if enabled) is processed by Google on US-based servers under Google's Privacy Policy.
privacy.s12Body: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. The "last updated" date at the top of this page will reflect any changes. Continued use of our website after the update date constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
privacy.s13Body: For any privacy-related questions: Email us at info@bananaaquapark.com · WhatsApp: +1 829-599-9540 · Address: Banana Aqua Park, Matachalupe, Higüey, La Altagracia, Dominican Republic.

terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Banana Aqua Park website (bananaaquapark.com) and the services offered at our venue in Matachalupe, Higüey, Dominican Republic. By visiting our website or making a booking, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.s1Body: BANANA Ranch Villages operates Banana Aqua Park, a tourism and hospitality venue offering aqua-park day passes, overnight villa accommodation, and private event services, located in Matachalupe, Higüey, La Altagracia, Dominican Republic.
terms.s2Body: We offer the following services subject to availability:
terms.s2I1: Aqua Park Day Pass: full-day park access from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, for adults and children.
terms.s2I2: PasaTarde (Afternoon Pass): park access from approximately 1:00 PM to 6:00 PM.
terms.s2I3: Villa Accommodation: overnight stays in villa rooms with optional add-on services (breakfast, airport transfer, spa, aqua park access).
terms.s2I4: Private Events: exclusive venue hire for weddings, celebrations, corporate events, and private parties. Subject to a separate event agreement.
terms.s3Body: Bookings are accepted via our website, WhatsApp, or in person. A booking is confirmed only upon receipt of official confirmation from Banana Aqua Park. We reserve the right to decline or cancel any booking at our discretion. Guest-facing reservations do not require an account; bookings may be retrieved using the confirmation code or email address provided at the time of booking.
terms.s4Body: All prices are quoted in Dominican Pesos (RD$) unless otherwise stated. Prices are subject to change without notice. Payment is accepted in cash, debit/credit card, or bank transfer, completed in person at the venue. No card or bank details are processed or stored through this website. Prices displayed online are indicative; the final price is confirmed at time of booking.
terms.s5Body: Cancellation and modification conditions vary by booking type. Please contact us directly via WhatsApp (+1 829-599-9540) or email to discuss your specific situation. We will make every effort to accommodate changes. Refund eligibility depends on the cancellation notice period and the type of service booked.
terms.s6Body: All overnight guests are required to present a valid government-issued identification document (national ID or passport) at check-in, as required by Dominican Republic tourism regulations. Day-pass visitors are not required to provide identification unless purchasing a booking at the venue.
terms.s7Body: All guests must comply with the following rules while on the premises:
terms.s7I1: Respect the safety rules posted at all aquatic attractions. Lifeguard instructions are mandatory.
terms.s7I2: Children under 12 must be accompanied by an adult at all times in the aqua-park area.
terms.s7I3: Alcohol consumption is permitted only in designated areas. Intoxicated guests may be asked to leave.
terms.s7I4: Outside food and beverages are not permitted in the park area unless for medical or infant dietary needs.
terms.s7I5: Glass containers are prohibited in the water-park and pool areas.
terms.s7I6: Management reserves the right to remove any guest whose behaviour is deemed unsafe, disrespectful, or disruptive, without a refund.
terms.s8Body: Banana Aqua Park takes all reasonable precautions for guest safety. However, participation in aquatic and recreational activities involves inherent risk. To the extent permitted by Dominican Republic law, Banana Aqua Park shall not be liable for injuries, loss, or damage arising from a guest's failure to follow posted safety instructions, or from natural events or circumstances beyond our control. Our liability for service failures is limited to the amount paid for the affected service.
terms.s9Body: Guests consent to being photographed or filmed as part of general venue photography used for promotional purposes. If you do not wish to appear in promotional material, please inform staff upon arrival. Guests may not photograph or film other guests without their consent. Drone use on the premises requires prior written authorisation.
terms.s10Body: All content on this website — including text, images, video, logos, and layout — is the property of BANANA Ranch Villages or its licensors and is protected by Dominican and international copyright law. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our prior written consent.
terms.s11Body: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Dominican Republic. Any disputes arising from these Terms or your use of our services shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of La Altagracia Province, Dominican Republic.
terms.s12Body: We may modify these Terms at any time. The updated version will be posted on this page with a revised "last updated" date. Continued use of our services after any modification constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
terms.s13Body: For questions about these Terms: Email us at info@bananaaquapark.com · WhatsApp: +1 829-599-9540 · Address: Banana Aqua Park, Matachalupe, Higüey, La Altagracia, Dominican Republic.
